## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on Outreach's content and SEO strategy with GrowthX partnership](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Outreach aims to accelerate pipeline/revenue through content/SEO, especially for enterprise/upper mid-market segments](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Key focus: positioning as AI revenue workflow platform, not just sales engagement tool](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=2363.0)
  - [Major bottleneck: content production bandwidth; GrowthX to help scale execution](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=3334.0)
  - [Success metrics: increased pipeline (new logos/expansion), higher MQL-to-SAL conversion, improved booking ARR from organic/content](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=3491.0)

## Topics

### Outreach's Current Market Position

  - [Known for BDR/sales engagement, but platform has evolved significantly](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=2245.0)
  - [Consolidates multiple point solutions (sales engagement, coaching, forecasting, AI) into unified revenue workflow platform](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Challenge: Market perception hasn't fully caught up with platform's expanded capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=2353.0)

### Content Strategy and Execution

  - [Recent focus: Refreshing outdated content, implementing SEO best practices](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=2821.0)
  - [Process: Hadassah creates SEO briefs, Maria executes content creation](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=3001.0)
  - [Current output: 2-4 blogs per month, 8-10 days per post](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=3098.0)
  - [Gap: Need more middle/bottom funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=2874.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Primary competitors: Gong, Clari, SalesLoft](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=2245.0)
  - [Gong perceived as "louder" in marketing; Outreach working on compete pages](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)

### GrowthX Partnership Objectives

  - [Scale content production and refresh existing content at high volume](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=2659.0)
  - [Augment Outreach team's capacity for strategic initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=3374.0)
  - [Improve organic visibility, including in AI-powered search](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=2743.0)

### Key Personas and Use Cases

  - [Priority persona: Revenue Operations Leader](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=2122.0)
  - [Use case: All-day platform usage for team management, forecasting, pipeline health monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)

### Measurement and Attribution

  - [Using HockeyStack and Tableau for content performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=3634.0)
  - [Focus on pipeline generation, MQL to SAL conversion, booking ARR tied to organic/content initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=3491.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to access Outreach's content backlog (via Asana or CSV export)](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=3189.0)
  - [Outreach to share attribution model and current organic performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=3634.0)
  - [Schedule deep-dive session on GrowthX's workflows and processes](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=3369.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin content strategy development and execution planning](https://fathom.video/share/x3nRu92avtNhciuEWnayixWXwdmYmjWd?tab=summary&timestamp=3654.0)
